highlights.text: Last Wednesday at 4pm I wrote: “Bull case tomorrow: The macro pattern remains a large triangle pattern shown in bolded yellow below with resistance just a little above 6766 and support down at 6605…..At 2pm today, ES put in a Failed Breakdown under 6698 and ripped us higher.
The bull case tomorrow is that ES can resume up to backtest 6766 again.
There was more incoming today I wrote at the close yesterday: “I defer to the trend.
I wrote last Tuesday at 4pm (one week ago): “The best setup here is to wait for the Failed Breakdown of Sunday’s 6694 daily low.
We flushed 90 points down to 6690, Failed Breakdown, recovered 6694 and the leg up began.
However, there was more technical analysis here at play than this singular Failed Breakdown.
Last Wednesday’s Failed Breakdown lit the final fuse to break it out.

After that if bulls have the momentum, we can head higher to 6782, then we likely head to all time highs after .” We made it to all time highs by Friday, and on Friday at 4pm I stated: “The obvious target for this leg is resistance of the big purple multi-month megaphone in the below chart at 6858.
If it clears we can progress to the next batch of upside targets were are 6875-77, then 6900.” We got to 6900+ by the close yesterday.

post_title: FOMC and Earnings Tomorrow. Expect Volatility In SPX. But What Way? Oct 29 Plan
